title: oxalis dilatata
intro: Oxalis dilatata, also known as the Purple Wood Sorrel, is a perennial herb belonging to the wood sorrel family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant. The health benefits of Oxalis dilatata include its potential to reduce urinary tract issues, alleviate symptoms of arthritis, and support the immune system. Oxalis dilatata can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
